item.title: NFLUKIRE: NFL UK & Ireland @NFLUKIRE · 25min What play comes to mind first when you see the @nyjets logo? New York Jets UK & IE
item.description: NFL UK & Ireland @NFLUKIRE · 25min What play comes to mind first when you see the @nyjets logo? New York Jets UK & IE y New York Jets 7 2 1 1 mil

item.title: Clevta: Clevta @Clevta · 8h Orlando it is Cita Clevta @Clevta · 18 abr. Excluding the bubble, 10 straight years a home favorite
item.description: Clevta @Clevta · 8h Orlando it is Cita Clevta @Clevta · 18 abr. Excluding the bubble, 10 straight years a home favorite of 3+ pts in gm1 of the playoffs has lost outright. Last year GS beat HOU as 3 pt dogs (+10). Avg spread has been 6.5 so not small upsets in general. Altho none were upsets of a team favored by DD. Candidates this year would 3 19 12 mil

item.title: GeorgeTsilfidis: George Tsilfidis @GeorgeTsilfidis · 8h LFG Cita Orlando Magic @OrlandoMagic · 8h GAME WON !! 2 304
item.description: George Tsilfidis @GeorgeTsilfidis · 8h LFG Cita Orlando Magic @OrlandoMagic · 8h GAME WON !! 2 304

item.title: Schultz_Report: Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 8h One more clip from Jordyn Tyson that he just posted. Looking like a human joystick:
item.description:
Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 8h One more clip from Jordyn Tyson that he just posted. Looking like a human joystick:
(: @tyson_jordyn ) Cita Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 8h 0:06 Arizona State WR Jordyn Tyson posted on IG this catch he made during his personal workout Friday in front of NFL teams:
(via @tyson_jordyn) 96 385 3 mil 546 mil
